name: Harness Engineering for LLM-Driven GPU Kernel Generation
summary: arXiv:2607.17979v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) can assist GPU kernel generation, but their practical effectiveness depends on whether generated code can be reliably...
description: arXiv:2607.17979v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) can assist GPU kernel generation, but their practical effectiveness depends on whether generated code can be reliably constrained, validated, profiled, and selected. This paper presents a harness-centered system for LLM-driven GPU kernel optimization in the MLSys 2026 FlashInfer AI Kernel Generation Contest on NVIDIA...
author: Yue Shui, Chenyu Ma, Hangfei Xu, Shengzhao Wen, Yanpeng Wang
